chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Crl. Trans. Application No.41 of 2023 (Mir Baig v. The State and others) __________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 20.05.2024 Mr. Abdul Haleem Jamali, advocate for the applicant Mr. Shaukat Ali Bhanbhro, advocate for the private respondents Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG for the State ========= It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant is apprehending danger to his life at the hands of the private respondents while attending the Court at District West Karachi, therefore, his case is to be transferred to any of the Court of competent jurisdiction outside Karachi, which is opposed by learned Addl. PG for the State and learned counsel for the private respondents by contending that the applicant is applying delaying tactics. Heard arguments and perused the record. The case of the applicant has been pending before the learned trial Court since 2022; its transfer to any other Court of competent jurisdiction outside Karachi at this stage would defeat its early disposal, which is a prime object for the Courts to achieve Consequent to the above discussion, the instant Crl. Transfer Application is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E
